title: SAME-DAY ACUTE CARE - 211info
text: 7TH AVENUE ACUTE CARE CLINIC SAME-DAY ACUTE CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides treatment for minor illnesses or injuries that do not require hospitalization but need direct attention. 232 SE 7th Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted, must meet income guidelines if applying for sliding scale fees. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 359-5564 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 359-5564 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Vaires by service. Accepts Oregon Health Plan (OHP), Medicare Advantage, and private insurance, and offers sliding-scale fees for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income if requesting sliding scale fees LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Urgent Care Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - BCCTP HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - WELLNESS CENTER HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. 7TH AVENUE ACUTE CARE CLINIC
